_comment_2: Local-emu-test variant of instance.json. Drop-in replacement when running cvd-1 against the local RKA server (RUN_LOCAL_RKA_FOR_EMU_TESTING.bat) instead of Hetzner production. Operator deploys this by copying it over source/patches/instance.json OR by setting RKA_HOST/RKA_PORT env vars at cvd boot.
_comment_3: Differences from production instance.json: rka_host -> 127.0.0.1 OR cvd host-bridge gateway; device_template -> pixel6a (matches kernel-apk fleet); build_fingerprint -> Android 15 BP1A.250505.005 (matches lukeprivacy doctrine + verified GET_FINGERPRINT response from local server 2026-05-24T17:08Z).
_notes: If cvd cannot reach 127.0.0.1 from inside the VM, use the cuttlefish host-bridge gateway IP (typically 192.168.97.1 for QEMU-bridge cvds) and bind the RKA server to 0.0.0.0 not 127.0.0.1.
auth_token kept identical to production so libsinister_attest.so doesn't need to be reauthored.
build_fingerprint matches the verified GET_FINGERPRINT response from the local Java RKA server with --device pixel6a default.
